name: Herb Ripper Standard Stainless Steel Grinder (4-Piece)
summary: Herb Ripper Standard Stainless Steel Grinder (4-Piece) — a grinder for any patient preparing dried flower.
description: The newly redesigned Herb Ripper Stainless Steel Grinder (2", 4-piece) offers increased herb capacity and improved shredding ability compared to the previous model. Its updated design minimises jamming and delivers a hybrid grind (fine/medium) for optimal grinding results. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
